title: application.rejected payload (v1)
description: Emitted when an application is rejected. Producer: candidate-service (apps/candidate-service/src/lib/decision-events.ts). `reason` is already a courteous reason-code LABEL (never raw recruiter notes) — safe to surface to the candidate. Ids are plain strings (cuid). Matches the typed ApplicationRejectedPayloadSchema.
x-consumers: notification-service (courteous rejection email to the candidate; audit + webhook fan-out)

reason.description: Candidate-facing reason LABEL mapped from a reason code (never raw notes), or null.
